ideas.name: convert-text-to-dense-vectors
ideas.author: Vehir
ideas.description: Qwen3-Embedding-4B dense vector service — runs as a persistent embedding worker generating 2560-dimensional normalized vectors for semantic search and retrieval

edges.author: Vehir
edges.description: Stores generated dense vector embeddings in the memory entries table through the db client library for later retrieval and reranking
